title: 3D Mace Model
description: Changes the new Mace to be a 3D Model, similar to MC Dungeons.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b86eec48b6e918c51304eb429bdae342e58d3f.png)
### Current Mace Texture Too Boring?

Let that boring, old mace texture be banished away with this all-new 3D MACE MODEL!
![Mace Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/736a46c823f785505497d8b050504419691d519c.png)

Isn't that model just swell?

Download today!
![Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/577299b8f3e156dc09194de49ee1decd5b66bfd3.png)
